2026-04-07.dialogue: Yo dude, in Total Recall, what planet is Quaid OBSESSED with going to?
Quick question -- who directed The Breakfast Club?
TELL ME, MORTAL! In Predator, where does the alien hunt Arnold's team?
I'll bet you twenty bucks -- what's the name of the computer in WarGames that nearly starts World War III?
Dearie, I'm looking for picture shows where the big muscly fellow is in all of them, you know, the Austrian bodybuilder...
Good shopkeep, I seek tales where the young nobles gather in fellowship. A breakfast gathering, perhaps, or a night at St. Elmo's...
There is a thread connecting certain films... the machine that thinks, the machine that schemes, the machine that turns against its master.
I tried to cook while watching Commando. Got so distracted by the one-liners I burned my souffle. Arnold destroys kitchens even through a TV screen.
EMERGENCY! I need to return this tape before midnight or the late fee doubles! This is a CODE RED situation!
Why did the VHS tape go to therapy? Because it had too many ISSUES with tracking! Get it? Tracking? Like the picture quality?

2026-04-08.dialogue: UHHH MY MOM SAID I CAN'T WATCH ALIENS UNTIL I'M LIKE TWELVE BUT HOW MANY XENOMORPHS ARE IN THAT MOVIE ANYWAY??
2026-04-08.question: How many xenomorphs are in Aliens?

2026-04-08.dialogue: My boyfriend keeps quoting that elevator scene from Die Hard. What does Hans say to the executive again?
2026-04-08.question: What does Hans Gruber say to executive Takagi in Die Hard?

2026-04-08.dialogue: Settling a bet with my sister. Who directed The Shining?
2026-04-08.question: Who directed The Shining?

2026-04-08.dialogue: MY FRIEND SAYS FERRIS BUELLER BREAKS THE FOURTH WALL BUT WHAT DOES THAT EVEN MEAN??? DOES HE LIKE, PUNCH A WALL OR SOMETHING??
2026-04-08.question: What does 'breaking the fourth wall' mean in Ferris Bueller's Day Off?

2026-04-08.dialogue: Looking for something my grandson might like... you know, the follow-up picture that folks liked even more than the first one. Hard to believe sometimes.
2026-04-08.hintCategory: Sequel Better Received Than the Original

2026-04-08.dialogue: Date night. Need something that takes place basically all in one spot, really intense, you know? Keeps you locked in.
2026-04-08.hintCategory: Set Almost Entirely in One Building

2026-04-08.dialogue: My wife wants something where the title is just somebody's name. Like, just their first name, nothing else.
2026-04-08.hintCategory: Title is a Character's First Name Only

2026-04-08.dialogue: ONE TIME I REWOUND A TAPE SO FAST THE MACHINE STARTED SMOKING AND MY DAD SAID IT WAS GONNA EXPLODE BUT IT DIDN'T BUT NOW WE HAVE TO REWIND TAPES REAL SLOW LIKE GRANDMA DRIVES!!!
Guy came in last week, returned Planes, Trains and Automobiles, said it gave him PTSD from his actual Thanksgiving commute. Still charged him the late fee though.
My kid keeps asking why they don't just call these 'movie stores' instead of 'video stores.' I told him it's because we're fancy.

2026-04-15.dialogue: OOOOH I know this one!! In Beverly Hills Cop, what city does Axel Foley travel FROM to get to Beverly Hills?
My book club just read a Stephen King novel. In Stand by Me, who wrote the original novella it's based on? Trick question!
In Carrie, what triggers the bucket of blood to fall on her at prom?
answers: A rope pulled by her bullies

2026-04-15.dialogue: Now let me think... In Home Alone, what's the name of those two burglars the boy fights off? The, uh, Wet Bandits?
I need movies featuring that hilarious fellow, the one who does all those characters and voices. Talks so fast you can barely keep up! Like a blender on high speed.
The master storyteller of horror has his fingerprints on these tales. Not as director, but as the one who first put pen to paper. The source material, the origin.
2026-04-15.hintCategory: Based on a Stephen King Book

2026-04-15.dialogue: URGENT! I need films where somebody shows up and you just KNOW the comedy legend is going to steal every scene, even if he's barely in it. Big guy, super funny, Canadian.
2026-04-15.hintCategory: John Candy Has a Cameo or Small Role

2026-04-15.dialogue: I tried to do the Footloose dance at my school and KICKED the principal's coffee right off his desk!! He was NOT impressed but everyone else CHEERED!
My membership card expired in '84 and they still let me rent because I wear a suit. Confidence is everything in this economy.
We're picking out our wedding movie to play at the reception. My fiance wants Coming to America. I want Stand by Me. We might not make it to the altar.

2026-04-10.dialogue: My teacher said Jaws was about a SHARK but like what KIND of shark?? Do you know??
A question of honor! In Raiders of the Lost Ark, what artifact is Indiana Jones searching for?
I was just reading about this -- who both starred in AND directed the movie Reds?
A Clockwork Orange was banned in several countries. Who directed it?
Oh sweetie, I'm looking for films by that wonderful man with the beard and the glasses. Made all those adventure pictures and the one about the dinosaurs.
I SEEK FILMS WHERE THE STAR IS ALSO THE ONE CALLING THE SHOTS! The warrior who commands both in front of and behind the battlefield!
I need movies where looking at the poster makes you want to go to SPACE. You know, rocket ships, starships, that sort of thing right there on the artwork!
2026-04-10.hintCategory: The Movie Poster Has a Spaceship

2026-04-10.dialogue: Last time I rented Jurassic Park the tape got stuck in my VCR. Had the dinosaur roar on loop for three hours. My cows wouldn't come in from the field.
I told my mom E.T. was a DOCUMENTARY and she believed me for like TEN WHOLE MINUTES and then my brother ruined it!! He ruins EVERYTHING!
Someone called the station because they thought Cannibal Holocaust was a real documentary. I had to file an actual report. That was my Tuesday.

2026-04-11.dialogue: I know this I know this!! In The Little Mermaid, what does Ariel trade to the sea witch to become HUMAN??
In Ghostbusters, what is the name of the demigod that possesses Sigourney Weaver's character?
Dearie, I love that picture The Magnificent Seven. What foreign film was it a remake of?
In Grease, John Travolta wears a wig the whole time! But what's the name of his character?
I want the movies with the DRAWINGS that move!! Like with the singing and the princesses and stuff! The ones from the mouse castle company!
I seek films connected by one comedian. A man who is the ghost, the golfer, the soldier, the weatherman. He appears in all of them like a phantom with perfect comedic timing.
I'm looking for movies where the leading man has a whole different head of hair than usual. Like, the wig IS the performance, you know?
2026-04-11.hintCategory: The Lead Actor Wears a Wig in Every Scene

2026-04-11.dialogue: I WEPT during Beauty and the Beast! The Beast reminded me of my uncle Bjorn! Large, hairy, terrible table manners, but a HEART OF GOLD!
My older brother taped over my Lion King with some boring football game and I haven't spoken to him in THREE WEEKS. This is WAR.
Scarface is three hours long. That means I need to check the smoke detectors THREE times during one viewing. Safety never sleeps, people.

2026-04-09.dialogue: In The Burbs, what do Tom Hanks and his neighbors suspect the new family next door of being?
TREMORS IS THE BEST MOVIE EVER!! But what do they call the underground monsters??
Now let me remember... In Mrs. Doubtfire, Robin Williams disguises himself as an elderly what?
Wes Craven directed The Serpent and the Rainbow. Where is it set?
I need movies starring that funny guy! The one who was always goofing around before he got all serious and won Oscars. You know, Splash, The Money Pit, that era!
2026-04-09.hintCategory: Tom Hanks Before He Got Serious

2026-04-09.dialogue: I need films where the men put on dresses and heels! My fiance thinks its hilarious. I think it takes real COMMITMENT, like a marriage!
2026-04-09.hintCategory: Lead Actor in Drag for the Role

2026-04-09.dialogue: I'm lookin' for movies about critters and creatures that come out of nowhere and wreck everything in a little town. You know, real pest control nightmares.
2026-04-09.hintCategory: The Monster Attacks a Small Town

2026-04-09.dialogue: I once watched Killer Klowns from Outer Space in total silence. No reaction. My friends thought I was broken. I was simply studying the enemy.
My roommate recorded our answering machine message over a rented copy of Bachelor Party. The video store was NOT amused. We still owe them twelve bucks.
I watched The Blob and now I won't eat JELLO. I won't eat GUMMY BEARS. I won't eat anything JIGGLY. My mom is SO mad at me right now!

2026-04-12.dialogue: A test of knowledge! In Demolition Man, what restaurant is the only one to survive the franchise wars of the future?
Scream is meta as heck. Who plays the killer's first victim in the opening scene?
In Escape from New York, what's the name of Kurt Russell's character?
Oh my, that Terminator picture. What year does the Terminator travel back to?
I NEED FILMS WITH THE MIGHTY STALLONE! The Italian Stallion! The man of muscles and mumbled dialogue! Where he PUNCHES and SHOOTS things!
I'm looking for horror films where more than one person is doing the killing. You know, a team effort. Partners in crime, so to speak.
2026-04-12.hintCategory: Slasher With More Than One Killer

2026-04-12.dialogue: I need films where the same man who directed also cooked up the music. Like a chef who also designs the restaurant. A one-man show. Horror films, mostly.
My babysitter let me watch Nightmare on Elm Street and now I sleep with ALL the lights on and my mom got the electricity bill and she is NOT HAPPY!
I've calculated that my annual late fees at this store exceed my car payment. I'm not proud of this. But I'm not changing either.
Watched This Is Spinal Tap on a recommendation from my nephew. I spent twenty minutes trying to turn my TV volume to eleven before my wife told me it was a joke.

2026-04-18.dialogue: CRITICAL QUESTION! In Blade Runner, what are the human-like androids called?
In After Hours, the whole movie takes place during one chaotic night in what neighborhood?
WARRIOR'S QUIZ! In The Fugitive, Harrison Ford's character is wrongly convicted of murdering whom?
In the film Legend, directed by Ridley Scott, who plays the Lord of Darkness?
I remember that fella from the Star Wars pictures and the adventure ones with the hat and the whip. He was in a bunch of exciting films as the leading man.
I need films where the entire story wraps up before sunrise the next day. Like a wedding that actually stays on schedule! Everything in twenty-four little hours!
2026-04-18.hintCategory: Entire Movie Takes Place in 24 Hours

2026-04-18.dialogue: I need films where what people called them during filming was totally different from the final title. You know, the old switcheroo! The name game!
2026-04-18.hintCategory: Famous Working Title Was Completely Different

2026-04-18.dialogue: I brought my Tindendo to the video store and my mom said PUT THAT AWAY but jokes on her because I beat level 5 while she was picking a movie for FORTY MINUTES!
Do the Right Thing makes me crave pizza every single time. Sal's Famous might be fictional but that oven is the real star of the film.
My friend said Return of the Jedi isn't as good as Empire and I told her she was WRONG and now we're not talking and it's been FOUR DAYS!

2026-04-13.dialogue: In Lethal Weapon, who plays Riggs' partner Roger Murtaugh?
Goodfellas is based on a true story. What real-life mobster is Ray Liotta playing?
In Jumanji, what comes OUT of the board game when they play?? I need to know because I'm NEVER playing board games again!!
In The Right Stuff, the film follows test pilots who become what?
I seek tales where the hero Gibson charges into battle! The warrior from the wasteland, the Scottish rebel, the lawman of lethal repute!
I'm after movies where things that really happened got turned into a picture show. Real events, real people, that sort of honest storytelling.
DISPATCH! I need films where the person behind the camera sneaks themselves into a scene! Like a secret inspection! A covert cameo!
My dad says Braveheart is historically INACCURATE and I said DAD it has FACE PAINT and SWORDS and that's ALL I NEED!
I once drove to three different video stores on a Friday night looking for WarGames. My wife waited in the car. We're divorced now. Unrelated. Probably.
We're screening Spaceballs at our wedding reception. My mother-in-law says it's 'inappropriate.' I say may the Schwartz be with us!

2026-04-14.dialogue: In Ace Ventura, what ANIMAL is Ace trying to find for the Miami Dolphins?? I bet you don't even KNOW!
In Footloose, why is dancing banned in the town?
answers: The town minister pushed for the ban after teens died in a car accident
A fire broke out at a school dance
The mayor lost a dance contest and holds a grudge
The town council thought it was immoral

2026-04-14.dialogue: In The Bodyguard, Whitney Houston sings that beautiful song. What's it called, dearie? The big one everyone knows?
In The Blair Witch Project, what state are the filmmakers lost in?
I NEED THE RUBBER-FACED MAN! The one who talks from his rear end, who wears the green mask, who cannot tell a lie! His comedies bring GREAT JOY!
Some films have albums that eclipse the story itself. The music becomes the legend. The soundtrack outlives the screen. That is what I seek.
I need movies set during the holidays! Chestnuts roasting, snow falling, presents under the tree. The season of giving, you know? That festive time of year.
2026-04-14.hintCategory: Takes Place on or Around Christmas

2026-04-14.dialogue: I watched The Mask and tried to spin around really fast in the living room to see if I'd turn into a TORNADO. I broke the lamp AND the coffee table.
Why did the VHS go to the party? Because it heard it was going to be a REEL good time! No? How about -- what do you call a late video return? A FINE romance!
Dumb and Dumber is actually the most realistic business film ever made. I've worked with both of those guys. They run Fortune 500 companies now.
2026-04-14.dismiss: So you're telling me there's a chance

2026-04-17.dialogue: In Big Trouble in Little China, what's the NAME of Kurt Russell's character?? My dad says it ALL the time!
In The Lost Boys, what California beach town is the movie set in?
In The Karate Kid, what does Mr. Miyagi have Daniel do as part of his training?
In True Lies, Jamie Lee Curtis discovers her husband is secretly what?
I need them pictures with the blood-drinkers, you know? The ones who sleep in coffins and can't handle garlic. Undead folk. Night creatures.
I need movies with those scenes where someone trains really hard set to awesome music! Push-ups, running, the whole workout montage thing! Like preparing for a wedding, honestly.
Oh sweetie, I need films by that man who did the space aliens and the big boat that sank. Very dramatic pictures. He likes strong women and big explosions.
TOMBSTONE! Doc Holliday is the GREATEST warrior of the Western frontier! 'I'm your huckleberry' -- I say this to EVERYONE I meet now!
Fright Night is actually a pretty good training video for identifying threats in your neighborhood. I filed it under 'continuing education' with my captain.
My sister watched Interview with the Vampire and now she won't stop HISSING at people and wearing a CAPE to school! The teacher called my mom TWICE!

2026-04-16.dialogue: In Dead Poets Society, what phrase does Robin Williams' character teach his students to live by?
In Batman, who plays the Joker?? NOT the new ones, the ORIGINAL cool one from 1989!!
The Princess Bride -- who says the line 'My name is Inigo Montoya, you killed my father, prepare to die'?
A question of cinema lore! In A Nightmare on Elm Street, which now-famous actor made their film debut?
I'm looking for movies with that incredible man who does all the voices and impressions. Genie, Peter Pan, the radio DJ in Vietnam. A comedic force of nature.
I need movies based on comics! You know, the ones that started as panels on a page before they hit the big screen. POW! BANG! ZAP!
Looking for films where a brand new face showed up and became a huge star. Like, you watch it now knowing who they become and it's wild. Their very first role on screen.
I told everyone at school that Robin Williams is the genie in Aladdin and nobody believed me and I was SO MAD because I was RIGHT!!
When Harry Met Sally taught me that a well-timed emotional outburst in a restaurant can silence any opponent. A weapon I had overlooked.
My grandson made me watch Misery and now I'm terrified of nurses. I have a checkup next week. I might cancel. That Kathy Bates is TOO convincing.

2026-04-19.dialogue: In Raising Arizona, Nicolas Cage's character steals one of a set of how many babies?
In Rain Man, Dustin Hoffman's character is a savant who's amazing with what?
They Live is SO COOL!! What does Roddy Piper find that lets him see the aliens??
Dearie, in Reservoir Dogs, the criminals all use fake names. What are they based on?
I SEEK THE CAGE! THE WILD-EYED ONE! The man who goes from whispering to SCREAMING in every film! Moonstruck! Raising Arizona! That glorious madman!
I need films where the characters are traveling cross-country. Highway movies, road movies, the open road. Getting from point A to point B is the whole plot.
ATTENTION! I need movies where the filmmakers were practically kids themselves! Super young directors, under thirty, calling the shots on their very first big projects!
My fiance proposed during Thelma & Louise. Right at the ending. I was crying for COMPLETELY different reasons. The timing was honestly terrible. I still said yes.
Face/Off is the CRAZIEST movie!! They swap FACES?! I tried to swap faces with my dog using tape and it did NOT work and now he won't look at me!
Pee-wee's Big Adventure taught me more about cross-country travel than any map ever did. That man rode his bike across America. Respect.
2026-04-19.dismiss: I know you are but what am I

2026-04-20.dialogue: In Alien, what is the name of the commercial spaceship whose crew encounters the xenomorph?
TELL ME! In RoboCop, what is the name of the corporation that creates the cyborg police officer?
In Beetlejuice, how many times do you have to say his name to summon him?
In Scream, the killer asks trivia questions about SCARY MOVIES!! What movie does the killer ask about in the opening??
I need films with that tall lady, the one who fought the space monsters and the ghosts. Very commanding presence. She's in all these sci-fi pictures.
I need movies where suddenly everyone breaks into song or dance even though it's NOT a musical! Like if I just started singing in the kitchen mid-service. Spontaneous performance!
I seek visions of a world yet to come! Tales set in the days ahead, where machines rule or cities gleam with strange lights. The future, good shopkeep!
Why did Poltergeist make a terrible roommate? Because it was always CHANNELING something! Also it never paid rent. Just static and screaming.
I watched Back to the Future Part II and now I REALLY want a hoverboard!! My dad said they don't exist yet and I said WELL THEY SHOULD and he said GO TO BED!
My boyfriend insists Risky Business is a 'coming of age classic.' I insist it's the reason he dances in his underwear when he thinks I'm not home.

2026-04-21.dialogue: ATTENTION! In The Shining, what does Jack Nicholson's character type over and over?
answers: All work and no play makes Jack a dull boy

2026-04-21.dialogue: In Highlander, what is the famous tagline about the immortals?
In The Shawshank Redemption, what does Andy Dufresne use to tunnel out of his cell over the years?
In Coming to America, Eddie Murphy plays a PRINCE! But what country is he the prince of??
I seek films connected by one legendary actor. The master of menace and mischief. The Shining grin. The Joker's laugh. He commands every frame.
I NEED FILMS THAT BECAME TELEVISION SAGAS! Movies so mighty they spawned entire shows that ran for seasons! The story was too big for just one viewing!
I'm looking for movies that flopped at the box office but became huge on video. Nobody saw them in theaters but everyone rented them. Sleeper hits, you know?
2026-04-21.hintCategory: Box Office Bomb That Became a VHS Cult Classic

2026-04-21.dialogue: I saw Dead Ringers and I tried to convince everyone at school I have a TWIN BROTHER who goes to a DIFFERENT SCHOOL and nobody bought it because I'm a TERRIBLE liar!
Office Space is the most accurate film ever made. I worked in a cubicle before I became a chef. I still flinch when I hear a printer.
The Parent Trap is basically my wedding planning right now. Two sides that can't agree on anything but somehow it all works out. Hopefully. Fingers crossed.

training-1.dialogue: OOOOH OOOOH I know this!! In Ghostbusters, what is the name of the green ghost they catch at the hotel?
Here is a fun one -- in Airplane!, what should you not call Leslie Nielsen?
ANSWER, MORTAL! In The Shawshank Redemption, what does Andy Dufresne crawl through to escape prison?
In Dirty Dancing, what is Baby's real first name?
Dearie, I want movies that make you laugh till your sides hurt. The kind where nothing is taken seriously and everyone is having a wonderful time.
I seek tales of courtship and devotion. Films where two souls find each other against all odds, you understand.
There are films that creep in the shadows... ones that make you afraid to turn off the lights. I seek those.
I watched The Exorcist at a sleepover and now I can't eat pea soup EVER AGAIN. My mom is SO MAD because she just bought a whole case of it.
Nobody puts Baby in a corner, but somebody DID put my sourdough starter in a corner and now it is dead. Sixteen years of nurturing, gone.
A kid came in here last week and asked if we had any movies WITHOUT genres. Just vibes. I told him that is not how this works.

training-2.dialogue: Quick -- in Casablanca, what famous line does Rick say at the airport? Hint: it involves problems and a hill of beans.
answers: The problems of three little people don't amount to a hill of beans

training-2.dialogue: In 2001: A Space Odyssey, what is the name of the ship computer that goes haywire?
TELL ME! In Back to the Future, what speed must the DeLorean reach to travel through time?
Yo, in The Matrix, does Neo take the red pill or the blue pill to see the truth?
I remember a time before television. Some of these pictures are from that era -- the black and white days of the forties, real class.
Some of these films are from the decade of big hair, synth music, and action heroes. You know the one I'm talkin' about.
I'm looking for films from the decade that gave us Titanic. The nineties, darling. What a time to be alive.
My grandpa says movies were better in HIS day but then he fell asleep TEN MINUTES into Citizen Kane so I do NOT believe him.
Why did the time traveler go to the movie store? Because he heard they had BACK issues! Get it? Back to the Future? Back issues? I'll see myself out.
I tried to organize my tapes by decade once. Gave up after twenty minutes and just sorted them by color. It's a better system honestly.

training-3.dialogue: Easy one -- who played Superman in the original 1978 film?
Dude, in Spider-Man 2, what is the name of the villain with the metal tentacle arms?
Dearie, who played the Dark Knight in the 1989 Batman film?
HEAR ME!! What is Ernest's catchphrase that he says to his neighbor Vern? KnowhatImean?
Some of these films follow the same hero across multiple chapters. A man who flies, perhaps... from Krypton.
There's a group of films here about a certain wall-crawling vigilante. Swings around the city on webs. You know the type.
Now some of these movies star a real lovable goofball. Fella named Ernest. Always gettin' into trouble at camps, jails, and such.
I wore my Batman cape to school EVERY DAY for a month and the teacher called my parents. They said I was 'disruptive' but I was PROTECTING THE CLASSROOM.
I once made a Superman-themed cake for a kid's birthday. The fondant cape kept drooping. Superman would never. It was humiliating.
I watched ALL FOUR Ernest movies in ONE DAY and now I talk like him and my sister says she's gonna MOVE OUT and she's only nine!!

training-4.dialogue: SPEAK! In Field of Dreams, what famous line does the voice whisper to Kevin Costner?
answers: If you build it, he will come

training-4.dialogue: In A League of Their Own, who says 'There's no crying in baseball'?
In The Mighty Ducks, what is the name of the youth hockey team that Gordon Bombay coaches?
In Caddyshack, what animal wreaks havoc on the golf course the entire movie?
Some of these films involve the sport of gridiron -- helmets, shoulder pads, touchdowns. A noble battle upon the field.
There's a set of films here about the great American pastime. Bats, balls, diamonds -- not the jewelry kind.
A few of these are about the sport with the tiny white ball and the little holes. My fiance is obsessed. We're honeymooning at Pebble Beach.
I tried to do the Happy Gilmore swing at mini golf and the club flew out of my hands and hit a clown's mouth. The REAL clown mouth, not the hole. We got BANNED.
Every time I watch Rudy I cry at the end. My crew caught me once and now they play the theme song over the station intercom when I walk in.
Why did the hockey player go to the video store? He heard they had great CHECKS! Ha! Get it? Checking? Like in hockey? And also checking out movies?

clark-s-first-puzzle.dialogue: Quick question - in Halloween, what's the name of Michael Myers' psychiatrist who's been chasing him around?
Settle a bet with my buddy - Airplane! came out the same year as what other disaster? The Shining or Caddyshack?
answers: Neither, they both came out in 1979

clark-s-first-puzzle.dialogue: UHHH MY MOM SAID I COULD RENT SPACEBALLS IF I KNEW WHO PLAYED THE PRINCESS??? She's got like, giant hair buns or whatever!
My wife wants to know - The Texas Chain Saw Massacre, was that Tobe Hooper or Wes Craven who directed it?
MY SISTER KEEPS SCREAMING AND SAYING THERE'S A HOOK GUY AND GHOSTFACE AND I DUNNO WHAT THAT MEANS BUT SHE WANTS SCARY MOVIES FROM LIKE... NOW??? HELP!!!
Looking for something that makes fun of other movies, you know? Leslie Nielsen, Mel Brooks type stuff. Recent ones.
Need something wholesome for my grandmother. Romance, small town, nothing too edgy. Those made-for-TV type movies?
Off duty tonight, thank God. Last Friday I had to break up a fistfight over the last copy of The Princess Bride. Two grown men rolling on the floor by the popcorn machine.
Why did the VHS tape go to therapy? Because it kept getting rewound! Get it? RE-WOUND? I've been working on my material!
Back in my day, we didn't need all these fancy tapes. We had the radio, and we used our imaginations. Now I can't figure out how to rewind the darn things...

wednesday-horror-night.dialogue: HEY HEY HEY what's the name of the killer doll in Child's Play?? I NEED ONE FOR MY BIRTHDAY!!
Dearie, my late husband loved that shark picture. What was the police chief's name in Jaws?
Settle this for me -- who directed The Birds? My boyfriend says it's Romero but he's an idiot.
MY DAD LET ME WATCH THE EVIL DEAD AND NOW I CAN'T SLEEP!! WHAT STATE IS THAT CABIN IN ANYWAY???
I seek tales of masked fiends who stalk their prey with bladed weapons. The kind where you shout at the maiden to flee.
Looking for something where the house itself is the problem, you know? Like maybe you should just MOVE.
I deal with dangerous animals on the job sometimes but NOTHING like the ones in these movies. Teeth, claws, the works.
I watched Jaws before a beach vacation. Spent the entire trip standing on the shore like a sentinel. My family was not amused.
I MADE MY OWN CHUCKY DOLL OUT OF MY BROTHER'S TEDDY BEAR AND SOME KETCHUP AND NOW HE WON'T COME OUT OF HIS ROOM HAHAHAHA!!!
Someone returned The Amityville Horror and the tape was warm. WARM. I don't want to know why and I'm not rewinding it.

wednesday-franchise-frenzy.dialogue: I'm a franchise investor, so I appreciate a good sequel. Which Halloween film has nothing to do with Michael Myers?
answers: Halloween III: Season of the Witch

wednesday-franchise-frenzy.dialogue: Yo, in A Nightmare on Elm Street 3, what do the kids call themselves when they fight Freddy?
My friend says Friday the 13th Part III was originally shown in 3D. Is that actually true? What format was it?
I love Bride of Chucky. Who plays Chucky's bride Tiffany in that one?
I'm looking for the ones with the hockey mask fella. He's at that lake camp, you know. The whole bunch of 'em.
My kids keep having nightmares and they say some fella with a striped sweater and knives for fingers is in all of 'em. Got a whole series about it?
I'm looking for that series with the creepy little doll? I think he eventually gets a wife. Relationship goals, honestly.
Why did Jason Voorhees fail math class? Because he could never make it past FRIDAY! Get it? Friday the 13th? I'll see myself out.
I RENTED ALL FOUR CHILD'S PLAY TAPES AND STACKED THEM LIKE A TOWER AND MY MOM KNOCKED THEM OVER AND I SCREAMED LIKE CHUCKY WAS ACTUALLY IN THE ROOM!!!
Got a noise complaint from someone watching all four Nightmare on Elm Street movies back to back. They weren't screaming at the TV -- the TV was screaming at them. Busted VCR.

wacky-wednesday-murders.dialogue: A question of cunning! In Silence of the Lambs, what is Hannibal Lecter's profession before he became... notorious?
My babysitter let me watch The Ring and NOW I'M SCARED OF MY TV. How many days do you have after watching the tape??
Big Hitchcock fan here. In Rear Window, what's Jimmy Stewart's character stuck doing the whole movie?
answers: Sitting in a wheelchair with a broken leg

wacky-wednesday-murders.dialogue: MORTAL! In Se7en, the killer's scheme is based on what concept?
I want something from when pictures were still in black and white, dearie. The old murder mysteries, very classy, very Hitchcock.
The decade of disco brought something far darker. Chainsaws. Proms gone wrong. Hills with eyes that watch. Seek the terrors of the seventies.
I'm looking for the newer horror stuff -- early 2000s. You know, elaborate traps, cursed videotapes, that whole vibe.
I WATCHED FINAL DESTINATION AND NOW I'M AFRAID OF EVERYTHING!! ROLLER COASTERS, LOGS, BUSES, EVEN THE BATHTUB!! MY MOM SAYS I'M BEING DRAMATIC BUT DEATH HAS A PLAN!!!
Someone left a Texas Chain Saw Massacre tape in the returns bin with a note that just said 'sorry.' That's never a good sign. I put gloves on before I touched it.
Rented Vertigo for date night because I thought it was a romance. It is NOT a romance. Well, it kind of is? Anyway, there was no second date.

easter-puzzle.dialogue: Dear, I remember when Roger Rabbit came out... what year was that again?
easter-puzzle.question: What year was 'Who Framed Roger Rabbit' released?

easter-puzzle.dialogue: My fiancé keeps quoting that 'I love the smell of napalm' line. Which movie is that from?
easter-puzzle.question: Which war film features Robert De Niro and the infamous Russian roulette scenes?

easter-puzzle.dialogue: UHHH MY MOM SAID I CAN'T WATCH THE ROBOT COP MOVIE!! What's it rated anyway??
easter-puzzle.question: What rating did 'RoboCop' receive?

easter-puzzle.dialogue: I'm looking for that Costner movie with all the gangsters. Who directed The Untouchables?
easter-puzzle.question: Who directed 'The Untouchables'?

easter-puzzle.dialogue: Looking for something with... what do you call them... hippity-hoppity creatures. Fluffy ears, you know.
I WANT MOVIES WHERE DEAD PEOPLE COME BACK!! Like zombies but COOLER!! MY FRIEND SAID THERE'S ONE WITH A BIRD GUY!!
easter-puzzle.hintCategory: Resurrection Stories: Characters Who Return from Death

easter-puzzle.dialogue: I'm in the mood for something seasonal. You know, flowers blooming, new beginnings, that sort of thing.
easter-puzzle.hintCategory: Spring Forward: Films Set During Easter or Spring

easter-puzzle.dialogue: Guy came in last week, returned Fatal Attraction, wouldn't make eye contact. His wife was with him. I've never seen someone look so scared of a VHS tape.
We got a call about a 'suspicious package' behind the store last month. Know what it was? Someone's overdue copy of An Officer and a Gentleman. Six months late.
My ex tried to impress me by renting Watership Down for date night. Thought it was a cute bunny movie. We broke up halfway through.

monday-morning-rewind.dialogue: Quick quiz before I head to the office -- who directed Training Day?
Dear, I remember that courtroom movie with Joe Pesci... My Cousin Vinny. What state was it set in?
I HEARD THEY MADE ROCKY FOR LIKE NO MONEY!! HOW MANY DAYS DID THEY SHOOT IT IN??
Denzel Washington won his first Oscar for Glory, right? What branch of the military was his character in?
I seek films where the accused stand before the tribunal! Gavels striking, objections sustained, justice hanging in the balance!
You know them movies where nobody in the cast was famous yet? Like, you watch 'em now and go 'oh THAT'S who that is!'
monday-morning-rewind.hintCategory: Entire Cast Was Unknown at the Time

monday-morning-rewind.dialogue: There are films crafted under impossible constraints... shot in haste, completed before the moon could cycle. Speed creates its own power.
Some guy returned Philadelphia on a Monday morning and wrote 'This movie changed my life' on a napkin tucked inside the case. I laminated it. It's on the wall by the register.
Dude my older brother said Dazed and Confused is basically a documentary about what high school was ACTUALLY like in the 70s. He wasn't even born in the 70s though so like... sus.
Every Monday morning the same guy comes in and rents The Warriors. Every single Monday. Says it motivates him for the week. Whatever works, I guess.

two-for-tuesday.dialogue: Big Connery fan here. In The Hunt for Red October, what nationality is his character?
My buddy says Reservoir Dogs has no actual heist scene in it. Is that true?
MY DAD SAYS THEY ACTUALLY ESCAPED FROM ALCATRAZ FOR REAL!! HOW MANY GUYS ESCAPED IN THE MOVIE??
That Paul Newman picture, The Sting... what card game do they play in the big con?
Looking for films where somebody plans the perfect crime. You know, masks, vaults, getaway drivers, the whole nine yards.
I want movies where the ending you saw in theaters was NOT what the director wanted. Studios meddling, test audiences panicking, that whole mess.
Got a thing for movies set behind bars. You know, prison walls, guards, escape plans. The whole lockdown vibe.
Two-for-Tuesday! Know what else comes in twos? The number of brain cells I have left after watching Highlander three times in a row. THERE CAN BE ONLY ONE... brain cell!
A MAN RETURNED THE GREEN MILE LAST TUESDAY AND HIS EYES WERE RED AS BERRIES. HE SAID 'IT'S JUST ALLERGIES.' WE ALL KNEW. WE ALL KNEW.
Some guy tried to haggle the two-for-Tuesday deal down to 'free-for-Tuesday.' Manager just stared at him for like thirty seconds straight. He left without a tape.

midweek-madness.dialogue: Buddy cop question -- in Rush Hour, what precious artifact gets stolen from the Chinese consulate?
I saw The French Connection when it first came out. Gene Hackman chases a train in what city?
MY COUSIN SAID LAST ACTION HERO FLOPPED BECAUSE IT OPENED AGAINST WHAT MOVIE?? Something about dinosaurs??
Wes Craven's New Nightmare -- who plays herself in the movie, the actress from the original Elm Street?
I WANT THE MOVIES WHERE THERE'S A COP AND ANOTHER COP AND THEY DON'T LIKE EACH OTHER BUT THEN THEY'RE BEST FRIENDS!! THOSE ONES!!
I enjoy films where the characters are watching a film within the film. It's like a cinematic turducken, non?
I appreciate when actors put their bodies on the line. None of this CGI nonsense -- real stunts, real danger, real commitment.
midweek-madness.hintCategory: Lead Actor Did Their Own Dangerous Stunts

midweek-madness.dialogue: WEDNESDAY IS THE BEST DAY BECAUSE NOBODY'S HERE AND I CAN JUST SIT IN THE ACTION AISLE AND READ ALL THE VHS BOXES WITHOUT ANYONE TELLING ME TO STOP!!
My wedding's Saturday and my fiancé is in here renting Bad Boys instead of picking up the cake. If I end up on the evening news, you saw nothing.
Midweek is when the good tapes come back, dearie. All the weekend warriors return their rentals and suddenly the shelves are full again. It's like Christmas morning.

throwback-thursday.dialogue: John Travolta in Pulp Fiction -- what does he order at Jack Rabbit Slim's?
I watched Twister about fifty times. What scale do they use to rate the tornadoes?
In Chinatown, the detective played by Jack Nicholson has his nose sliced. Who wields the blade?
Michael J. Fox was NOT the first choice for Back to the Future. Who originally started filming as Marty McFly?
Looking for those big catastrophe pictures -- buildings falling, tidal waves, planes crashing. The bigger the destruction, the better.
Yo, I want movies set in L.A. -- like palm trees, highways, the Hollywood sign, all that California stuff.
I am curious about films where the hero we see was NOT the hero first chosen. A different warrior was meant to bear the mantle!
throwback-thursday.hintCategory: Lead Actor Was Not the First Choice

throwback-thursday.dialogue: Every Thursday some guy comes in wearing bell-bottoms and a butterfly collar asking for Saturday Night Fever. He dances out the door with it. Every. Single. Thursday.
A customer asked me to recommend a 'throwback' movie. I said Chinatown. He said he meant something from the 90s. I have never felt so old in my entire life.
Throwback Thursday? More like THROW BACK this tape that's been rewound so many times the picture looks like a Monet painting! Ha! Art jokes! I'm branching out!

friday-night-fever.dialogue: Bruce Willis in The Fifth Element -- what's the name of the supreme being he has to protect?
IN DIRTY DANCING, WHAT IS THE FAMOUS LINE PATRICK SWAYZE SAYS? ABOUT BABY AND A CORNER?
answers: "You can't put Baby in a corner"

friday-night-fever.dialogue: Das Boot is set during which war?
DIE HARD 2 IS SET IN AN AIRPORT RIGHT?? WHICH AIRPORT IS IT??
Friday night and I want to DANCE. Give me movies with big dance scenes -- disco, ballroom, whatever, just get me moving.
I like movies set on the water. Submarines, cruise ships, sailboats -- anything where you're stuck on a vessel with nowhere to go.
friday-night-fever.hintCategory: Set on a Boat or Ship

friday-night-fever.dialogue: Dearie, I've heard tell of films where they built a REAL working car or machine just for the picture. Not those computer tricks -- actual contraptions!
friday-night-fever.hintCategory: Prop Master Built a Fully Functional Vehicle

friday-night-fever.dialogue: Friday nights in here are CHAOS. Last week two teenagers got into a tug-of-war over the last copy of Die Hard with a Vengeance. The tape didn't survive. Neither did their dignity.
Every Friday my wife rents Dirty Dancing and I rent an action movie. We compromise by watching Dirty Dancing. Every. Single. Friday.
Some dude came in asking for 'that submarine movie where everyone speaks German.' I said Das Boot. He said 'No, I think it was in English.' Sir, the TITLE is German.

saturday-matinee.dialogue: MY MOM RENTED TEEN WOLF AND IT HAS THAT GUY FROM BACK TO THE FUTURE!! What sport does he play in it??
Enter the Dragon is considered Bruce Lee's masterpiece. What island is the tournament held on?
answers: A private island owned by Han

saturday-matinee.dialogue: That Clockwork Orange film was quite shocking, dear. What was the main character's name?
THE BLUES BROTHERS MOVIE HAS THE BIGGEST CAR CHASE EVER!! HOW MANY CARS DID THEY WRECK??
I seek films of combat discipline. Kicks and strikes, dojos and tournaments, the ancient arts of hand-to-hand warfare on screen.
I've heard some movies had to be cut down from an X rating or NC-17. Pushed the limits so far the ratings board freaked out.
I read somewhere that for certain movies they actually DEMOLISHED a real building for the shot. Not a set -- a real structure. Insane commitment.
saturday-matinee.hintCategory: A Real Building Was Demolished for Filming

saturday-matinee.dialogue: On Saturday mornings the store fills with younglings seeking animated tales. I too once sought such tales. Now I seek only honor. And also RoboCop.
Saturday matinee! When I was a kid we'd sneak into the second showing by hiding in the bathroom. Now I just rent VHS tapes like a law-abiding clown. Character growth!
My boy wants to rent Kickboxer for his birthday party. He's seven. I told him we're watching The Secret of My Success instead. He's not speaking to me.

sunday-slow-burn.dialogue: Robert De Niro in Raging Bull -- he gained how much weight for the older version of Jake LaMotta?
L.A. Confidential -- who plays the by-the-book detective Edmund Exley?
MY DAD MADE ME WATCH APOCALYPSE NOW AND IT WAS SO LONG!! WHAT RIVER DO THEY GO UP IN THE MOVIE??
The Usual Suspects -- what's the name of the legendary crime lord nobody believes is real?
I like those dark detective pictures. Femme fatales, neon signs in the rain, everybody smoking cigarettes and looking suspicious. The moody ones.
I've heard some movies have a director's cut that's basically a completely different film. Like, different ending, different scenes, the works.
I respect dedication. Some actors stayed in character for MONTHS -- off camera, at home, at restaurants. Total commitment.
sunday-slow-burn.hintCategory: Actor Stayed in Character Off-Set for Months

sunday-slow-burn.dialogue: Sunday is for slow movies. Spent all day watching Raging Bull and now I want to fight everyone in this store. That film does something to you.
MY GRANDPA FELL ASLEEP WATCHING APOCALYPSE NOW AND WHEN THE HELICOPTER SCENE CAME ON HE WOKE UP AND THREW THE REMOTE AT THE TV. SUNDAYS ARE WILD AT OUR HOUSE.
I love a Sunday slow burn. Made a cup of tea, put on Body Heat, and just let the afternoon melt away. This is what weekends are for.

the-clearance-rack.dialogue: Keanu Reeves in Speed -- what speed does the bus have to stay above or it explodes?
Dude, in Bill and Ted's Excellent Adventure, what do they use to travel through time?
Alien is famous for its tagline. What is it?
answers: "In space, no one can hear you scream."
"Who will survive and what will be left of them?"

the-clearance-rack.dialogue: Tremors takes place in a tiny desert town. What's the name of it?
I seek tales of survival against terrible beasts! Creatures that hunt in darkness, monsters with acid blood, things that burrow beneath the earth!
MY BROTHER SAYS THERE ARE MOVIES WHERE THE BOX COVER IS COOLER THAN THE ACTUAL MOVIE!! LIKE THE PICTURE IS AWESOME BUT THE MOVIE STINKS!!
the-clearance-rack.hintCategory: Movie Poster is More Famous Than the Film

the-clearance-rack.dialogue: I read that some classic films didn't even have a finished script when cameras started rolling. They literally made it up as they went along.
The clearance rack is where forgotten warriors go to rest. But sometimes... a customer rescues one. And it lives again. Mostly it's Gymkata though.
The clearance rack! Where dreams go to die for $1.99! I found a copy of Solarbabies there once and honestly? I overpaid!
Found a kid hiding behind the clearance rack eating candy he didn't pay for. When I confronted him he said 'You'll never take me alive' and ran. He was six.

back-of-the-store.dialogue: Tarantino's first film was Reservoir Dogs. What color name does Tim Roth's character go by?
In The Crow, Brandon Lee tragically died during filming. What was his character's name?
DEATH WISH! CHARLES BRONSON! What city does his character clean up?
THE WIZARD OF OZ IS LIKE A MILLION YEARS OLD!! WHAT COLOR ARE DOROTHY'S MAGIC SHOES??
I'm looking for those revenge pictures, dearie. Someone gets wronged and they come back with a vengeance. Very satisfying.
Films set in the great city of steel and glass... the island of Manhattan, where warriors walk among millions.
I've heard horror stories about movie sets where actors got seriously hurt. Not stunt doubles -- the actual stars. Dangerous business, filmmaking.
back-of-the-store.hintCategory: An Actor Was Injured on Set

back-of-the-store.dialogue: Customer whispered to me: 'What's in the BACK of the store?' I said 'A mop closet and my lunch.' He looked so disappointed. What was he expecting?
My fiancé found a bootleg copy of Kill Bill behind the store counter and tried to buy it. The manager said 'That's my personal copy.' They stared at each other for way too long.
THERE'S A SECTION IN THE BACK WITH A CURTAIN AND MY MOM WON'T LET ME GO IN THERE!! SHE SAYS IT'S FOR 'BORING ADULT MOVIES' BUT WHY IS THERE A CURTAIN THEN??

staff-picks.dialogue: Scorsese and De Niro are a legendary duo. How many films did they make together?
All the President's Men is about Watergate. What newspaper do Woodward and Bernstein work for?
IN JAWS THE SHARK POPS UP AND THE GUY SAYS THEY NEED A BIGGER SOMETHING!! BIGGER WHAT??
Fargo by the Coen Brothers -- what state is it primarily set in?
I'm into conspiracy stuff. Secret government programs, paranoid journalists, shadowy organizations pulling strings behind the scenes.
Some movies just NAIL the opening scene. Like, the first five minutes are so good you could almost stop watching after that. Almost.
staff-picks.hintCategory: Opening Scene Is the Best Scene

staff-picks.dialogue: I appreciate a good eye behind the camera. There's one cinematographer whose name keeps popping up on every best-of list. Roger something?
The staff picks shelf hasn't changed in three months. It's just whatever Todd likes. Todd likes Goodfellas. We all know Todd likes Goodfellas, Todd.
I put a staff pick sticker on every tape in the horror section. Manager made me peel them all off. Took four hours. Worth it for the look on his face!
The young man at the counter recommended The Manchurian Candidate. I told him I saw it in theaters in 1962. He looked at me like I was a time traveler. I suppose I am, in a way.

cult-corner.dialogue: Dude, in 12 Monkeys, Bruce Willis gets sent back in time from what year?
An American Werewolf in London won the first-ever Oscar for Best Makeup. Who did the effects?
Poltergeist -- who actually directed it? There's been a huge controversy about this.
SILVER BULLET IS BASED ON A STEPHEN KING BOOK RIGHT?? WHAT'S THE BOOK CALLED??
I seek tales of temporal displacement! Heroes flung through the ages, paradoxes unraveling, timelines bending like a bow!
I WANT THE SHINY TAPES!! THE ONES WITH THE HOLOGRAM COVERS THAT CHANGE WHEN YOU TILT THEM!! THEY'RE SO COOL DO YOU HAVE ANY??
cult-corner.hintCategory: VHS Cover Had a Lenticular or Holographic Sleeve

cult-corner.dialogue: I heard some movies had the director fired halfway through and someone else had to finish it. Hollywood politics, I tell you.
cult-corner.hintCategory: Director Was Fired and Replaced Mid-Shoot

cult-corner.dialogue: The cult corner is sacred ground. Here, the misunderstood films find their people. I once met a man who had watched The Howling forty-seven times. He had achieved enlightenment.
Got called to the store because someone was 'causing a disturbance' in the cult section. Turned out he was just loudly explaining why Tombstone is historically inaccurate. To nobody.
I spent three hours in the cult corner last Sunday and left with seven tapes. My husband asked if I joined a religion. Honestly? Closer to the truth than he thinks.

two-copies-left.dialogue: Jeff Goldblum in The Fly -- what does his character transform into?
Dawn of the Dead takes place almost entirely in what kind of building?
TOP GUN! KENNY LOGGINS! What is the name of that glorious song that plays during the volleyball scene?
RE-ANIMATOR IS LIKE THE GROSSEST MOVIE EVER!! What does Herbert West use to bring people back to life??
Looking for zombie flicks. Not the fast ones from later -- the classic shambling undead. Romero and that whole crew.
You know how some movie soundtracks sold more copies than the movie sold tickets? The music just took on a life of its own?
I heard the most disturbing thing, dearie -- that some older films used REAL human remains as props. Gives me the shivers just thinking about it.
two-copies-left.hintCategory: Used a Real Skeleton as a Prop

two-copies-left.dialogue: TWO COPIES LEFT of Jurassic Park and there are THREE people eyeing it. This is about to become a situation. I can feel it. Where's my walkie-talkie.
Only two copies left! That's one more than the number of brain cells I use to pick movies! I just go by the cover art! That's how I ended up watching Re-Animator at age nine!
I drove to three different video stores looking for The Fly. This is the last one with copies. If they're both rented out I'm going to have a very public meltdown.

the-drop-box.dialogue: Tim Burton's Beetlejuice -- how many times do you have to say his name to summon him?
CHILD'S PLAY!! THE DOLL'S NAME IS CHUCKY BUT WHAT'S THE REAL NAME OF THE KILLER INSIDE HIM??
Tron was groundbreaking for its use of computer graphics. What year was it released?
Fast Times at Ridgemont High -- who played the legendary stoner Jeff Spicoli?
I love movies about cursed objects. Dolls that come alive, cars that kill people, videotapes that doom you -- that creepy 'don't touch that!' vibe.
I WANT MOVIES WHERE THEY'RE IN SCHOOL!! LIKE HIGH SCHOOL WITH LOCKERS AND CAFETERIAS AND STUFF!! BUT SCARY ONES TOO!!
I'm fascinated by films that literally invented new special effects technology. Where they had to create something that didn't exist to get the shot.
the-drop-box.hintCategory: Had to Create a New FX Technique for the Film

the-drop-box.dialogue: Someone dropped a tape in the drop box at 3 AM last night. The security camera showed them sprinting away like they were being chased. It was a copy of Christine. The car movie. Fitting.
The drop box is a noble invention. Return your tape under cover of darkness, no judgment, no eye contact. It is the knight's preferred method of return. Ask no questions.
Dearie, I found a half-eaten sandwich inside a returned VHS case once. The tape was Pee-wee's Big Adventure. I don't know what I expected, honestly.

members-only.dialogue: Al Pacino's famous line in Scarface -- what does he say about his little friend?
In Lawrence of Arabia, who plays the title character?
THEY LIVE HAS THAT SCENE WHERE THE GUY PUTS ON SUNGLASSES AND SEES ALIENS!! WHO IS THE GUY??
Amadeus won Best Picture. How many Oscars did it take home that night?
I'm looking for alien movies. Not the friendly kind -- the kind where they come to Earth and wreck everything.
Yo, I want desert movies. Like sand dunes, scorching heat, no water for miles. That Mad Max vibe.
Dearie, are there films that bombed at the picture house but somehow won the big award anyway? That seems backwards to me.
members-only.hintCategory: Flopped Theatrically, Won Best Picture at the Oscars

members-only.dialogue: Members only! That's what the bouncer said when I tried to get into the video store wearing my pajamas at 2 AM. Joke's on him -- I WAS a member! The pajamas were just... a choice.
I've been a member here since 1987. My card is so worn you can barely read it. The clerk squints at it every time like I'm presenting a medieval artifact. Buddy, I was here before you were born.
MY MOM'S MEMBERSHIP CARD HAS A GOLD STAR ON IT BECAUSE SHE'S RENTED OVER 500 MOVIES!! SHE SAYS IT'S NOT SOMETHING TO BRAG ABOUT BUT I THINK IT'S THE COOLEST THING EVER!!

2026-vibe-jam.dialogue: UHHH MY MOM SAID I CAN RENT ONE MOVIE AND IT HAS TO BE EDUCATIONAL!! What's WarGames about??
answers: A kid hacks into a military computer and almost starts World War III
Kids get trapped in a board game and have to win to escape
A teenage hacker steals money from evil corporations
Computers become self-aware and take over the Pentagon

2026-vibe-jam.dialogue: My grandson keeps talking about this Bolt picture. Is that the one with the dog or the runner fellow?
answers: It's an animated movie about a dog who thinks he has superpowers
It's a documentary about Olympic sprinter Usain Bolt
It's about a dog who runs in the Olympics
It's a nature documentary about lightning storms

2026-vibe-jam.dialogue: Date night. She likes those feel-good movies. What's Good Vibrations about?
answers: A music drama about a record shop owner in Belfast during the Troubles
California surfers starting a rock band in the 60s
A Beach Boys biography from their early years
A romantic comedy set at a music festival

2026-vibe-jam.dialogue: MY DAD SAYS HACKERS IS COOL BUT IS IT COOLER THAN TINDENDO?? What do they even hack in it??
answers: They hack a corporate computer system and uncover an embezzlement scheme
They hack into NORAD and almost launch nuclear missiles
They hack ATMs to steal money for college tuition
They hack the FBI database to clear their criminal records

2026-vibe-jam.dialogue: Looking for something with good energy, you know? Groovy wavelengths. Positive frequencies.
My buddy's into those computer crime flicks. Breaking into systems, sticking it to the man, that whole scene.
I NEED MOVIES ABOUT GOING UP!! Like stairs but COOLER!! My brother says there's a bunch with the same word!!
Kid tried to rent Sneakers yesterday with a fake ID. Fake ID said he was 47 years old. Kid was maybe twelve.
Why did the VHS tape go to therapy? It had too many issues and kept getting rewound! Get it? REWOUND!
A gentleman always rewinds his tapes. Last week I returned The Net without rewinding. I haven't slept since. The shame is unbearable.
